appliedUpdates.description: Confirmed Cloud Storage bucket gen-lang-client-0579048282.firebasestorage.app is operational in prior round documentation

testingApproach: Hybrid API + chrome-devtools. Created Firebase test user via REST Identity Toolkit, tested artifact save/list/download via curl, verified browser UI via chrome-devtools (sign-in, library, session reopen with artifact preview and download). Cloud Storage bucket confirmed operational after round 1 provisioning.
